codeReview.summary: Successfully added 23 assessment questions (QB-067 to QB-089) covering all 8 Lecture 8 sections on string operations. Each section has 2-3 linked questions covering MOVSB, LODSB, STOSB, REP, CMPSB, SCASB, CLD/STD with a mix of conceptual and code-tracing types. Validation passed with 761 assertions.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The content-worker skill file (.factory/skills/content-worker/SKILL.md) exists but the transcript shows the worker couldn't invoke it (Error: Skill "content-worker" not found). Worker proceeded with content creation without the skill guidance.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Transcript shows: Error: Skill "content-worker" not found. Worker then manually created questions following the task description.

sharedStateObservations.observation: AGENTS.md requires 'Every assessment item must include concept tags and source references' but doesn't specify the exact field structure. Worker followed the existing question-bank.json pattern which includes concepts[], instructions[], and remediationRefs[].
sharedStateObservations.evidence: All new questions (QB-067 to QB-089) include concepts, instructions, difficulty, hints, explanation, and remediationRefs fields matching existing question structure.

summary: Feature passes scrutiny. 23 questions added for all 8 L8 sections with proper field structure. Validation passes. Minor observation: content-worker skill was unavailable during execution but worker completed task correctly following existing patterns.
